name: mimecast-integration
description: Mimecast email security operations via MCP. Manage held messages, TTP logs, users, groups, policies, and audit events.

client_id.title: OAuth 2.0 Client ID
client_id.description: OAuth 2.0 Client ID from Mimecast Administration → Services → API and Platform Integrations. Required if not using Legacy HMAC auth.

client_secret.title: OAuth 2.0 Client Secret
client_secret.description: OAuth 2.0 Client Secret from Mimecast API application.

app_id.title: Legacy App ID (HMAC auth)
app_id.description: Application ID for Legacy HMAC authentication. Leave blank if using OAuth 2.0.

app_key.title: Legacy App Key (HMAC auth)
app_key.description: Application Key for Legacy HMAC authentication.

access_key.title: Legacy Access Key (HMAC auth)
access_key.description: Access Key for Legacy HMAC authentication.

secret_key.title: Legacy Secret Key (HMAC auth)
secret_key.description: Base64-encoded Secret Key for Legacy HMAC authentication.

region.title: Region
region.description: Your Mimecast data region: us, eu, de, au, za, ca, uk, or sandbox

tools.name: mimecast_get_account
tools.description: Get Mimecast account information including domain, region, and package details.

tools.name: mimecast_list_held_messages
tools.description: List messages currently held in the Mimecast queue awaiting review.

admin.description: True for admin hold queue, False for user hold queue (default: false)

tools.name: mimecast_track_message
tools.description: Track messages through the Mimecast gateway by sender, recipient, or subject.

tools.name: mimecast_list_ttp_url_logs
tools.description: Get TTP URL protection scan logs showing clicked URLs and threat results.

tools.name: mimecast_list_ttp_attachment_logs
tools.description: Get TTP attachment protection scan logs for sandboxed email attachments.

tools.name: mimecast_list_users
tools.description: List Mimecast internal users, optionally filtered by name or email.

query.description: Search query to filter users by name or email (optional)

tools.name: mimecast_list_groups
tools.description: List Mimecast directory groups.

query.description: Search query to filter groups by name (optional)

tools.name: mimecast_list_managed_senders
tools.description: List managed senders (blocked or permitted) in Mimecast.

tools.name: mimecast_get_audit_events
tools.description: Get Mimecast audit events for admin activity tracking.

from_date.description: Start date ISO format (optional, default: 24h ago)

to_date.description: End date ISO format (optional, default: now)

tools.name: mimecast_list_policies
tools.description: List Mimecast policies of a given type (blocked-senders, permitted-senders, anti-spoofing).

tools.name: mimecast_release_held_message
tools.description: Release a held message from the Mimecast hold queue so it can be delivered.

message_id.description: ID of the held message to release (required)

reason.description: Optional reason for releasing the message

tools.name: mimecast_block_sender
tools.description: Add an email sender to the Mimecast blocked senders list.

to.description: Recipient address to scope the block to (optional)

comment.description: Optional comment describing why sender is blocked

tools.name: mimecast_permit_sender
tools.description: Add an email sender to the Mimecast permitted senders list.

to.description: Recipient address to scope the permit to (optional)

comment.description: Optional comment describing why sender is permitted

tools.name: mimecast_block_url
tools.description: Add a URL to the Mimecast TTP URL block list to prevent users from accessing it.

comment.description: Optional comment describing why URL is blocked

tools.name: mimecast_permit_url
tools.description: Add a URL to the Mimecast TTP URL permit list to allow users to access it.

comment.description: Optional comment describing why URL is permitted

tools.name: mimecast_get_ttp_impersonation_logs
tools.description: Get TTP impersonation protection logs showing emails blocked or warned as impersonation attempts.

days.description: Number of days to look back (default: 1, max: 7)

tools.name: mimecast_list_campaigns
tools.description: List awareness training campaigns with ID, name, status, and completion counts.

tools.name: mimecast_get_safe_scores
tools.description: Get per-user SAFE (Security Awareness For Employees) score details.

email.description: Filter to a specific user email address (optional)

tools.name: mimecast_get_phishing_results
tools.description: Get phishing simulation campaign results including open, click, and report statistics.

tools.name: mimecast_get_watchlist
tools.description: Get the high-risk user watchlist — users with the lowest SAFE scores or most security incidents.

tools.name: mimecast_get_campaign_users
tools.description: Get per-user data for awareness training campaigns.

tools.name: mimecast_get_performance
tools.description: Get company-wide awareness training performance details.

tools.name: mimecast_get_performance_summary
tools.description: Get a summary of company-wide awareness training performance.

tools.name: mimecast_get_phishing_user_data
tools.description: Get per-user data for phishing simulation campaigns.

tools.name: mimecast_get_safe_score_summary
tools.description: Get a company-wide summary of SAFE score distribution.

tools.name: mimecast_get_training_queue
tools.description: Get the current awareness training assignment queue.

tools.name: mimecast_get_training_details
tools.description: Get training module completion details, optionally filtered by user email.

email.description: Filter to a specific user email address (optional)

tools.name: mimecast_get_watchlist_summary
tools.description: Get a summary of the high-risk user watchlist including total users at risk and risk distribution.
